description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden bookshelf with a rich, dark brown finish. The front features five evenly spaced open shelves, providing ample storage for books or display items. The sides and back are solid panels, with the wood grain and some minor scuffs visible, giving it a classic and slightly worn appearance. The top and base are flat, with subtle molding details that add a touch of elegance. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its open and accessible design. This type of shelving unit is commonly found in libraries, offices, or urban public spaces for organized storage and display.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden bookshelf with five open shelves and solid sides, featuring a classic, slightly worn finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing five open shelves and the full height of the bookshelf.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow depth and solid wood panel construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bookshelf's slim profile.
